# SP-006 Hardening Test Fixtures

Synthetic test fixtures for the SP-006 production-hardening sprint:

- Kill-9 cross-stage recovery (US1) — `orphaned-telemetry.jsonl`
- `corpus://failures` MCP resource (US2) — `fixture-sidecars/*.{error,recovery.error}.json` + `malformed.error.json`
- Tier 1/2/3 fallthrough cascade (US3) — `synthetic-catalog.md` + `sample-docs/*.md`

## Provenance

All files in this directory are **synthetic** — generated by hand for the
SP-006 test suite. They do NOT contain any real document body content, user
data, or production telemetry. The doc IDs (`doc-00000001`, etc.) are
deterministically synthetic and intentionally distinct from any production
doc IDs.

## File inventory

### `orphaned-telemetry.jsonl`

A mixed-stage telemetry log containing one `daemon.started` marker followed
by interleaved `*.started` events for five docs — `doc-aaaaaaaa` (mid-index),
`doc-bbbbbbbb` (mid-classify), `doc-cccccccc` (mid-embed), `doc-dddddddd`
(mid-edges-build). Each doc has SOME but not ALL of its `*.completed` events,
simulating SIGKILL mid-pipeline.

Used by `tests/unit/recovery-scanner.test.ts` and
`tests/integration/end-to-end-recovery.test.ts`.

### `fixture-sidecars/*.error.json`

10 well-formed `.error.json` sidecars covering all SP-003 stages (`validation`,
`hash`, `normalize`, `persist`) plus SP-004 (`classify`), SP-005 (`embed`,
`index`, `edges-build`), and the SP-006-specific `unrecoverable_orphan`
(`doc-aaaaaaaa.recovery.error.json`).

Used by `tests/unit/failures-resource-{pagination,malformed-skip}.test.ts`
and `tests/integration/failures-resource-mcp.test.ts`.

### `fixture-sidecars/malformed.error.json`

A deliberately malformed sidecar (invalid JSON) used to drive the
`failures.sidecar_parse_failed` graceful-skip path.

### `synthetic-catalog.md`

50-line CATALOG.md flat-file mirror for Tier 2 fixture tests. Each line is
in the v1 format `<doc-id> | <title> | <facet_domain> | <facet_type> |
<summary-200>`. Doc IDs span `doc-00000001` through `doc-00000032`.

Used by `tests/unit/catalog-grep-tier.test.ts` and
`tests/integration/tier-fallthrough-end-to-end.test.ts`.

### `sample-docs/*.md`

5 Markdown body files (with frontmatter) used by Tier 3 fs-grep tests. Each
file's body is structured so a substring search like "tier_used" or "Kill-9"
matches exactly one file.

Used by `tests/unit/fs-grep-tier.test.ts` and
`tests/integration/tier-fallthrough-end-to-end.test.ts`.
